description: Gmail IMAP and Gmail API integration — read, search, send, reply, and manage emails

gmail_authorize.description: OAuth 2.0 authorization — opens browser, exchanges code for tokens, saves credentials

gmail_messages_search.description: Search messages via IMAP — read-only query, no modifications

gmail_message_get.description: Fetch a single message by UID with full body and attachments metadata — read-only

gmail_thread_get.description: Fetch all messages in a thread — read-only

gmail_message_attachments_save.description: Download attachments to local disk — writes files to the workspace

gmail_message_update.description: Mark message read/unread or starred/unstarred — reversible flag toggles

gmail_message_move.description: Move a message to another folder — reversible (can be moved back)

gmail_message_send.description: Send a new email via Gmail API — irreversible once sent. Plugin-level guard: requires confirm=true

gmail_message_reply.description: Reply to an existing message — irreversible once sent. Plugin-level guard: requires confirm=true
